data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tier-based perk visibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for tier-based perk visibility in storefront and booking flows. However, the prior steps do not provide any concrete evidence or checks related to this specific requirement. As a result, the validation cannot be completed, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of tier-based perk visibility in storefront and booking flows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
